title: Malegaon Fort
tagline: Malegaon Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Malegaon Fort is a land fort located in the town of Malegaon.
overview.description: Malegaon Fort is a land fort located in the town of Malegaon. It is located 104 km from Nashik, in Nashik district, of Maharashtra. The fort is on the north bank of the Mausam river, which is a tributary of the Girna river. It was built during the Maratha Empire.

topPlaces.name: Mausam River
topPlaces.description: The Mokshaganga River (Mosam River) is a river in Nashik District in Maharashtra, India. It is a left tributary of the Girna River.it flow through Malegaon taluka Of Nashik District.

topPlaces.name: Malegaon
topPlaces.description: Malegaon (IAST: Mālegāv; Pronunciation: [malegaːʋ]) is a city in Nashik District of Maharashtra State in India. It is situated on the bank of the Girna river with Mosam River river flowing through middle of the city dividing it in two parts.

topPlaces.name: Soyagaon
topPlaces.description: Soyagaon or soegaon is a Town and Taluka in Nashik District in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Dyane
topPlaces.description: Dyane is a census town in Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Vadgaon Malegaon
topPlaces.description: Vadgaon is a census town in Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Dabhadi, Malegaon
topPlaces.description: Dabhadi is a small town in Malegaon taluka of Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is located on Maharashtra State Highway 19 between the towns of Malegaon and Satana.

topPlaces.name: Kashti, Nashik
topPlaces.description: Kashti is a panchayat village in the state of Maharashtra, India. Administratively, Kashti is under Malegaon Taluka of Nashik District in Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Malegaon Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Malegaon Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Malegaon Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (97 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (98 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Malegaon Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Malegaon Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Malegaon Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Malegaon Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Malegaon Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mausam River, Malegaon, Soyagaon, Dyane, Vadgaon Malegaon.
